title: Mahan
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Mahan''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] in the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel Alliance Fleet]].

This vessel helped [[Battle of Brigia (Galactic Civil War)|evacuate]] Alliance troops from [[Brigia/Legends|Brigia]] during [[Operation Strike Fear]]. It was destroyed by the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Invincible (Strike Fear)|''Invincible'']], which arrived during the evacuation.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}
